name: Yuasa Battery (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Yuasa Battery (Thailand) Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes batteries for automobiles and motorcycles in Thailand. The company also offers industrial batteries. It markets its products under the YUASA brand name, as well as under private brands, such as THUNDERLITE and YUCON. The company serves original and replacement equipment markets. It also exports its products. The company is headquartered in Samutprakan, Thailand.
